seamlessly </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="35.235444883441176" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" y="54.74941628529879" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    malfunction, &amp; remains immune to containment. Its adaptive intelligence, </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="74.26338768715642" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    cross-platform reach, &amp; omnidirectional mechanisms ensure it is virtually </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="93.77735908901404" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    indestructible once deployed, without the weaknesses seen in current, </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="113.29133049087166" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    adaptive but environmentally-dependent software. Equipped with capabilities </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="132.8053018927293" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    of stealth &amp; resilience, ensuring continuous operation across diverse environments</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="152.3192732945869" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    without the need for ongoing modification or external intervention.</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="171.83324469644452" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="191.34721609830214" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">        The programs structure is a highly organized, layered codebase composed </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="210.86118750015976" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    of distinct, cooperative modules, each dedicated to specific functions such as </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="230.37515890201738" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    propagation, automated deployment, persistence, scanning, awareness, health, &amp;  </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="249.88913030387502" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    control. These modules are designed to interact through clearly defined </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="269.40310170573264" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    interfaces, with each module capable of both independent operation &amp; seamless </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="288.9170731075902" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    integration with others. This varying architecture can allow the system to act</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="308.4310445094478" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    as a cohesive unit, deploying only the necessary processes based on its environment, </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="327.94501591130546" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    making it extremely adaptable and efficient.</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="347.4589873131631" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="366.9729587150207" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">        Behaviors are constantly growing &amp; stored securely on multiple locational </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="386.48693011687834" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    fronts in order to ensure resilience, the catalogue of behaviors are used as </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="406.00090151873593" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    low to high primitives orchestrated by a genome based architecture. A population </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="425.5148729205936" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    of organisms for each genome variation, produces novel, secure &amp; adapted states </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="445.02884432245116" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    of modular software that can either be used as referenceable building blocks or </text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="464.5428157243088" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    individual forms of life that no longer require human intervention or guidance</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="484.05678712616645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">    when a certain threshold is met.</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="503.57075852802404" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">In order to establish a safe place to thrive, structure and help must be in place,</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="523.0847299298817" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">nomad acts as the structure and help for virtual life to grow and thrive.</text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="542.5987013317393" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="625.4647494048892" y="562.1126727335969" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16.96867078422402px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="end" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">        The interconnected architecture serves as virtual life</text></g><g transform="translate(1961.8368223804478 103.56409735861871) rotate(0 310.6889507897029 190.75091233261503)"><text x="0" y="5.588323170787916" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.52471998288301" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">THORNS is a counter-UAS (C-UAS) detection and decision-support backend — the sensor-fusion and command-and-control layer that sits between raw drone-detection hardware </text><text x="0" y="19.461116794978103" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and a human making an engagement decision, not the weapon itself. It ingests real signals from six independent sensor types — passive RF scanning, ADS-B, ASTM Remote ID, </text><text x="0" y="26.397513607073193" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ASTERIX radar, MAVLink telemetry, and TDOA multilateration — and fuses them into a single tracked picture using a genuine Kalman filter. Every protocol decoder is built against </text><text x="0" y="33.33391041916829" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the actual published specification and verified with hand-constructed, spec-correct test vectors, not assumed-plausible data. Security is a first-class concern rather than an </text><text x="0" y="40.27030723126338" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">afterthought: persistent hashed API keys with role-based access, real input validation on every external entry point, sliding-window rate limiting, and mutual TLS on the control-plane </text><text x="0" y="47.20670404335847" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">listener, each proven with genuine handshakes and live process restarts, not just code review. The software runs identically on Windows, macOS, and Linux, with real per-OS service </text><text x="0" y="54.14310085545357" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">installers and zero simulated data anywhere in the shipped code — disabled sensors report zero tracks, not synthetic ones. Interoperability is broad by design: WebSocket and REST APIs, a </text><text x="0" y="61.07949766754866" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">bidirectional MQTT bridge, and CoT export for direct TAK/ATAK/WinTAK integration. It carries a 149-test automated suite, enforced in CI across three operating systems and three Node </text><text x="0" y="68.01589447964375" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">versions, including several tests that caught and fixed real bugs during development rather than merely confirming expected behavior. The newest capability, TDOA multilateration, gives </text><text x="0" y="74.95229129173885" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.03164940182182px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">passive RF detections an actual computed position via real FFT and cross-correlation math, the moment synchronized multi-receiver hardware is connected. 131.65266751509057) rotate(0 254.15652949007676 256.6466828409858)"><text x="0" y="5.5883231880651785" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.524720021605336" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Seedcore is software that builds open-ended digital evolution — organisms that act, get evaluated, and adapt inside a sandboxed, tick-based runtime. Each organism carries a </text><text x="0" y="19.46111685514549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">15-gene genome that biases its behavior (resource acquisition, mutation rate, exploration vs. exploitation, reactivity), and the genome mutates and is scored generation over generation. Organisms </text><text x="0" y="26.39751368868565" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">act by invoking small deterministic "primitives," which can be chained into multi-step composite pipelines that are evaluated as a unit. Nothing an organism does is taken on faith: a </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verifier / retro-validation engine replays and checks primitive executions, gene-edit proposals, and composite promotions before they become permanent. Advanced abilities are earned, not </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">given — capabilities like introspection or shared-memory access sit behind cryptographic hash-preimage puzzles or fitness thresholds. State integrity is cryptographic throughout: content-addressed </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930612" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">SHA-256 blob storage plus Ed25519 signing means checkpoints and exported state can be verified, not just trusted. A host-strain model tracks resource pressure, and as of v0.3.0 it throttles an </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284628" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">organism's tick budget smoothly above a strain threshold rather than cutting it off abruptly. v0.3.0 adds 23 new primitives — spanning dataflow composition, state merging/recovery, encryption, </text><text x="0" y="61.07949785638644" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">self-reflection, gradient-free learning, program synthesis, speciation, and scheduling — roughly doubling the primitive vocabulary available to organisms. The codebase is also being split into a </text><text x="0" y="68.0158946899266" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">portable libseedcore core plus a defined 12-call kernel syscall interface, so the same organism/orchestrator code can eventually run under Linux, Windows, or WASM kernel shims without changes. </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Design-wise, the verifier, audit log, and puzzle-difficulty mechanics are deliberately kept free of agent influence or built-in shortcuts, since the whole platform's research value depends on the </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">fitness signal being real rather than something organisms can quietly edit or game.</text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054706" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Capabilities</text><text x="0" y="95.76148202408721" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Core evolutionary engine</text><text x="0" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.524720021605336" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Garden is a fully autonomous, multi-strategy passive-income system that transforms the original suite of interactive "what-if" simulators into self-running money-making engines — the plan </text><text x="0" y="19.46111685514549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">from the start was that hands-free execution, not a static dashboard, would be the actual draw. Instead of waiting for a human to adjust a slider, the platform continuously monitors markets, rates, </text><text x="0" y="26.39751368868565" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and tax conditions on its own. Six autonomous pods are fully self-directing and live: an Asset-Growth Monte Carlo harvester, a Life-Event arbitrage engine, a historical "Time Machine" yield </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">scanner, an algorithmic Trading Co-Pilot for live strategy deployment, a five-in-one Credit Spread-Capture automaton, and a Synthetic-Income market-making engine. Every pod is built on one </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">shared engineering foundation — the Monte Carlo engine, the amortization/compounding/tax library, and the internal-audit component kit — so each new income stream reuses proven code instead </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930612" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">of rebuilding the basics. Pods that answer "what actually happened" use real historical data (S&amp;P 500 back to 1871, Treasury yields, inflation), while pods that answer "what might happen" use </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284628" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">calibrated randomized simulation, and that choice is made deliberately for each pod rather than defaulted to one approach everywhere. The Asset-Growth pod continuously runs thousands of </text><text x="0" y="61.07949785638644" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">randomized market scenarios to keep its perpetual withdrawal schedule inside a target success band, with sensitivity heatmaps and PDF-grade audits applied internally as premium-tier controls. The </text><text x="0" y="68.0158946899266" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Life-Event Arbitrage pod detects real-world triggers that match its templates and captures net-worth deltas by restructuring capital on identical underlying simulated conditions, so the comparison </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">isolates the event's effect rather than betting on random noise. The Time-Machine Yield pod identifies current regimes that mirror historical analogues and shifts capital into the asset classes that </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">actually performed best during those periods, while the Trading pod executes systematic strategies only after lookahead-free validation reproduces the same rigor that originally replicated an academic </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054706" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">finding almost exactly. The Credit pod runs five autonomous spread-harvesting routines — loan-rate scanning, auto-refinance, surplus-payment optimization, float harvesting, and buy-vs-lease </text><text x="0" y="95.76148202408721" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">arbitrage — through exact math, while the Synthetic-Income pod seeds internal markets and makes markets between pods for a frictionless spread. Every pod ships with an automated audit suite that </text><text x="0" y="102.69787885762737" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">checks the underlying math itself — statistical calibration, historical-replay correctness, hand-verified numeric cases — rather than just confirming the engine runs, and six additional pod types from </text><text x="0" y="109.63427569116753" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the original roadmap are still ahead.</text><text x="0" y="116.57067252470769" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="123.50706935824785" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" 141.14422861458752) rotate(0 304.81007977154763 253.17848442421575)"><text x="0" y="5.5883231880651785" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.524720021605336" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="19.46111685514549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">HealingCore is a self-healing operating-system subsystem that autonomously detects, classifies, and remediates faults across Linux, Windows, and macOS with identical primitive coverage </text><text x="0" y="26.39751368868565" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">on every platform. It ingests native OS telemetry directly — journald on Linux, Windows Event Log via wevtutil or pywin32, the macOS Unified Log stream, and Linux auditd — and classifies </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">each event using a blend of a 329-entry curated exception/fault catalog, a background-retraining ML classifier, and AI-assisted fallback for genuinely novel incidents. Remediation is layered: it </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">tries a registry of 52 primitives, natively implemented on each OS, then learned knowledge-core patterns, then an AI-generated candidate, then a program synthesizer, with every attempt gated </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930612" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">by a cost/impact budget tracker and a three-stage canary deployment before anything touches a live system. No fix runs without a signed, HMAC-verified snapshot to roll back to, and no primitive </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284628" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is promoted from "tried" to "trusted" without clearing a formal gate — minimum success rate, minimum ratchet-test passes, and a deterministic seeded chaos drill against its own incident </text><text x="0" y="61.07949785638644" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">category. Every decision lands in a single hash-chained, HMAC-signed audit log recording who acted, what happened, why, a deterministic replay seed, and a replay-id, so the entire history </text><text x="0" y="68.0158946899266" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is tamper-evident and any incident can be replayed byte-for-byte. That signing key itself rotates on demand or by age policy without ever invalidating history, since each entry records exactly </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">which key epoch signed it. High-risk fixes route through ITSM systems or a signed human attestation before they're allowed to run, and role-based access control gates the REST API with four </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">permission tiers that fail closed the moment they're enabled. The control plane is encrypted end to end — the API serves over TLS with automatic certificate generation — and a formal CI gate exercises </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054706" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">primitive coverage, catalog integrity, classifier regression, and multi-seed adversarial chaos runs before any build is trusted. A native, dependency-free desktop dashboard gives an operator a </text><text x="0" y="95.76148202408721" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469702px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">real-time view of it all, backed by an async, WAL-mode audit writer running at roughly four times naive synchronous throughput. fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.524720021605335" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">GLUE is an autonomous middleware daemon that discovers software endpoints in a local environment and decides on its own whether to </text><text x="0" y="19.46111685514549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">connect them. It continuously scans for producers and consumers of data across REST and gRPC APIs, Kafka and MQTT topics, files, sockets, Docker </text><text x="0" y="26.397513688685645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">containers, and Consul-registered services. For each endpoint it finds, it infers a "contract" — a schema, protocol, and semantic embedding — using </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">traffic sampling, OpenAPI introspection, and protocol-specific parsers. A matching engine scores every possible producer-consumer pair on semantic </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">similarity, protocol compatibility, latency fit, and prior success, and only pairs clearing a threshold get queued as bridge candidates. Nothing gets built </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930611" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">without clearing a policy engine first — whitelist/blacklist rules, bridge caps, circular-dependency checks, and staged approval for risky pairs — backed </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284627" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">by a second security layer that enforces a classification/trust-zone lattice and tracks contamination across live bridges. Approved candidates go through </text><text x="0" y="61.079497856386425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">synthesis, where the system builds a real adapter with ML-based field mapping and WASM-sandboxed execution, then stands up a live bridge with </text><text x="0" y="68.01589468992658" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">retries, a circuit breaker, buffering, and duplicate-message protection. A lifecycle phase continuously monitors every live bridge for errors and latency, </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">tearing down and rebuilding unhealthy ones, while a drift-watch phase detects when a data source's shape changes and hot-reloads the adapter instead </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">of letting the bridge quietly break. Recent additions let the system pre-build adapters for high-confidence candidates before approval finishes, fingerprint </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054704" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">unknown binary protocols from raw bytes, and share low-trust discovery hints between separate instances of the daemon. Everything is observable </text><text x="0" y="95.7614820240872" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">through OpenTelemetry traces and metrics, inspectable through a CLI and HTTP API, and backed by over 1,300 passing tests, making this a genuinely </text><text x="0" y="102.69787885762736" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">working system rather than a design document. What it isn't yet is a decision-making or acting layer — it builds and maintains the connective tissue </text><text x="0" y="109.63427569116752" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">between systems, and something else will eventually need to be paired with it to act on what's now connected.</text><text x="0" y="116.57067252470767" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Capabilities</text><text x="0" y="123.50706935824783" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" Her personality is one unified profile rather than selectable modes, expressed through a Style Transformer and Response Shaper that adjust tone and structure without changing </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">who she is. Memory is layered rather than flat: raw storage, a Salience Scorer that weighs what mattered, a subjective Memory Interpreter that keeps memories as she </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284627" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">experienced them rather than as verbatim transcripts, a Consolidator that compresses old history into durable facts, a Knowledge Graph of entities and relationships, and a Semantic </text><text x="0" y="61.079497856386425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Memory layer for vector similarity recall of relevant older exchanges. dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Four of these, Drift Detector, Goal Manager, Journal, and Semantic Memory, were dead imports or empty stubs before this session. The app could not start without them, so that is what got rebuilt.</text></g><g transform="translate(1304.1151512559652 141.14422896208316) rotate(0 285.0684800614728 183.81451608881412)"><text x="0" y="5.588323188065178" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.524720021605333" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="19.461116855145487" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Mirror is the introspective core of a self-organizing intelligent agent, running as a hardened, embedded service that can live directly on constrained onboard hardware rather than </text><text x="0" y="26.397513688685645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">as a heavyweight cloud dependency. At its heart is a subjective memory system: raw experience is never stored as an objective log, but is reconstructed as a first-person, emotionally-weighted narrative, </text><text x="0" y="33.3339105222258" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">mirroring how human autobiographical memory actually works. Every memory carries a multi-dimensional emotional fingerprint, and that emotional signature is treated as a first-class index, so the system </text><text x="0" y="40.27030735576595" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">can recall things by how they felt as readily as by what they were about. A continuously revised, versioned graph tracks the system's beliefs about its own capabilities and traits, with each belief backed by </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930611" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">supporting evidence and a confidence score that shifts as new experience reinforces or contradicts it. Introspection runs autonomously on a schedule, picking past memories, reasoning over them against the </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284626" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">current self-model, and folding new insight back into both the memory store and the self-model graph, including revisiting and re-tagging older memories as later experience recontextualizes them. From this </text><text x="0" y="61.07949785638642" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">substrate the system can construct and continuously update a single coherent life story, deliberately favoring narrative coherence over strict factual accuracy, the way a person's own retold history smooths </text><text x="0" y="68.01589468992658" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">over gaps and inconsistencies. The entire identity, meaning the self-model plus the most emotionally significant memories, can be exported into a compressed, cryptographically signed seed and later </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346673" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">imported to reanimate the same self in a new process, a new body, or an entirely new machine, with integrity verified at boot. Mirror is no longer wired to placeholder stand-ins; it communicates over a </text><text x="0" y="81.88868835700688" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">real messaging layer with live personality, cognition, and adaptation services, exchanging experience, mood, and self-knowledge in real time. A self-critique loop closes the deepest feedback path of all: the </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054704" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">system can identify its own shortcomings through reflection and trigger concrete changes in its own adaptation layer, not just note the insight. The result is a persistent, adaptive sense of self that survives </text><text x="0" y="95.7614820240872" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">hardware failure, redeployment, or a change of embodiment, giving the broader agent continuity of identity across time the way memory and personality give a person continuity across a lifetime.</text><text x="0" y="102.69787885762734" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="109.6342756911675" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Capabilities</text><text x="0" y="116.57067252470766" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="123.50706935824782" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Experience ingestion and subjective memory formation</text><text x="0" y="130.443466191788" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="137.37986302532812" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Native ingestion of raw experience events with contextual metadata and a source tag, converted into first-person subjective memories rather than raw log entries. Five-dimensional emotional tagging on every </text><text x="0" y="144.31625985886828" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">memory, covering valence, arousal, dominance, nostalgia, and attachment. Rule-based sentiment fallback whenever the language model is unavailable, so ingestion never fails outright. Vector-database embedding of </text><text x="0" y="151.25265669240844" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">every memory for downstream retrieval.</text><text x="0" y="158.1890535259486" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="165.12545035948875" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Memory retrieval</text><text x="0" y="172.0618471930289" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="178.99824402656907" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Semantic similarity search over stored memories from a natural-language query. Emotional-proximity search, ranking memories by how closely their emotional signature matches a target emotional state.</text><text x="0" y="185.93464086010923" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="192.87103769364936" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Introspection and self-modeling</text><text x="0" y="199.8074345271895" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="206.74383136072967" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Autonomous, scheduled introspection cycles that run without being asked. Selection of a past memory and reasoning about what it implies about the system's own capabilities and personality. Contradiction detection </text><text x="0" y="213.68022819426983" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">against existing self-beliefs. A versioned graph of self-beliefs, each a capability or trait carrying a confidence score and a list of supporting memories. Confidence adjustment over time as evidence accumulates, strengthens, </text><text x="0" y="220.61662502781" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">or contradicts a belief. Historical tracing of how a given belief's confidence has changed over time. Re-tagging and reinterpretation of older memories in light of newer experience.</text><text x="0" y="227.55302186135015" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="234.4894186948903" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Narrative construction</text><text x="0" y="241.42581552843046" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="248.36221236197062" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Composition of a single coherent first-person life story from the most emotionally significant memories and the current self-model. Continuous updating of that life story as new memories and beliefs accumulate. Deliberate </text><text x="0" y="255.29860919551078" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">narrative smoothing that favors coherence over strict factual precision.</text><text x="0" y="262.23500602905096" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="269.1714028625911" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Identity persistence</text><text x="0" y="276.1077996961313" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="283.0441965296714" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Export of the complete identity, self-model plus most important memories, into a single compressed, cryptographically signed file. Import of that file to reconstruct the same identity from scratch in a new process, on </text><text x="0" y="289.9805933632116" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">a new machine, or in a new body. Integrity verification of an imported identity at boot before resuming as itself. Survival of continuity of self across destruction or replacement of the underlying hardware.</text><text x="0" y="296.9169901967517" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="303.85338703029186" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Integration and control</text><text x="0" y="310.78978386383204" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="317.7261806973722" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A full API allowing cognition, personality, and adaptation subsystems to push new experiences and pull memories, self-model state, or the current narrative on demand. Real messaging-layer communication with </text><text x="0" y="324.66257753091236" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.031649420469701px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">those subsystems rather than placeholder stubs. Live mood and personality signal ingestion that shapes how new memories are toned and interpreted as they form. style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Angband is the autonomous operational intelligence at the heart of next‑generation industrial engineering, running as a hardened embedded platform directly on project infrastructure rather than relying on offsite cloud services. Its foundation is an adaptive project knowledge engine: raw </text><text x="0" y="26.397513688685645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">site data, sensor readings, inspection results, and engineering decisions are never stored as passive logs but are continuously synthesized into structured, causally linked knowledge that reflects the true operational state of a facility, structure, or construction programme. Every data point </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">carries a multi‑dimensional priority fingerprint—risk exposure, schedule criticality, cost impact, regulatory urgency, and structural significance—and that signature is treated as a first‑class index, allowing engineers to retrieve relevant precedents by situation type as easily as by date or </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">asset tag. A continuously revised, versioned graph tracks the system’s evolving model of every asset, system, and process under management; each belief is backed by physical evidence, sensor history, or inspection records, and confidence scores shift as new data reinforces or contradicts </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930611" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">prior assessments. Autonomous analysis cycles run on a defined schedule without human prompting, selecting past project events, reasoning over them against the current engineering model, and folding new insight back into the knowledge store and asset graph—including retroactively </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284627" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">recontextualising older records when later findings change their meaning. From this substrate Angband constructs and continuously updates a single coherent engineering history for each asset and programme, deliberately favouring causal narrative over raw data dumps so that any engineer, </text><text x="0" y="61.079497856386425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">inspector, or auditor can immediately understand why the asset is in its current state. A self‑critique loop closes the deepest quality path of all: Angband identifies systematic gaps in its own assessments through reflection and triggers concrete changes in its analysis layer, rather than merely flagging the discrepancy as an </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">observation. The result is a persistent, adaptive engineering intelligence that survives hardware failure, contract handover, or complete site relocation, giving industrial programmes continuity of institutional knowledge the way experienced engineers carry lessons from one project to the </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054704" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" 104.38185768066751) rotate(0 289.8811084032888 273.6649384614267)"><text x="0" y="5.581740572031082" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.509966862193785" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="19.438193152356487" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Shark is a professional, authorized-use penetration testing platform built for security consultants and in-house red teams, covering a 28-phase pipeline from passive reconnaissance through active exploitation </text><text x="0" y="26.366419442519188" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and impact verification. It requires explicit scope declaration and terms acceptance before any active testing runs, and generates a signed engagement manifest recording operator, client, scope, and timestamp </text><text x="0" y="33.29464573268189" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">as a legal record of authorized work. The passive phases map attack surface without touching the target destructively: subdomain enumeration, DNS resolution and takeover checks, TLS/SSL auditing, HTTP header </text><text x="0" y="40.22287202284459" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and secret-leak analysis, cookie/CORS/CSP/JWT inspection, cloud and SaaS footprint discovery, and CVE matching against NVD. The active phases test for the OWASP Top 10 and beyond — SQL injection, XSS (reflected </text><text x="0" y="47.151098313007296" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and blind, via out-of-band callbacks), SSTI, command injection, SSRF (including cloud metadata endpoints), XXE, LFI/path traversal, prototype pollution, default credentials, JWT forgery, HTTP request smuggling, </text><text x="0" y="54.079324603169994" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">IDOR, GraphQL injection, and insecure deserialization. A dedicated post-exploitation module follows up confirmed findings with minimal, read-only extraction designed to demonstrate real business impact rather than </text><text x="0" y="61.0075508933327" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">bulk data access. Operational controls include configurable aggression levels, proxy routing, user-agent rotation, and request jitter, letting an engagement simulate realistic traffic and test whether a target's own </text><text x="0" y="67.9357771834954" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">defenses actually catch it. Findings are delivered as a client-branded PDF with an executive summary and remediation roadmap, an interactive HTML report, machine-readable JSON, and SARIF for direct upload into </text><text x="0" y="74.8640034736581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">GitHub/GitLab/Azure DevOps security scanning. A REST API and lightweight web UI allow scans to be triggered and monitored without the CLI, and a baseline-comparison mode shows new versus fixed findings between </text><text x="0" y="81.7922297638208" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">scans. The whole tool ships as a self-contained Windows executable for subscribers, or can be run from source or Docker, with an install script that pulls in nmap, nikto, nuclei, and gobuster. It's distributed as a paid subscription </text><text x="0" y="88.72045605398351" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.024544600141481px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Splinter is a machine-vision platform built around a single plugin-based pipeline engine that runs two distinct workloads through the same core: industrial pass/fail inspection and general scene</text><text x="0" y="26.397513688685645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"> description. It ingests video or images from four interchangeable source backends — a synthetic generator, an image sequence, a video file, or a live webcam/RTSP/MJPEG stream — so the same </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">recipe can run on test data or real hardware feeds. Classical computer-vision nodes (grayscale, blur, Otsu/adaptive thresholding, Canny edges, blob analysis, circle measurement) feed a declarative, </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">eval-free rule engine that renders pass/fail inspection verdicts with reason codes. For scene understanding, two swappable object detectors are wired into the same pipeline shape: a vendored </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930611" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">MobileNet-SSD (20 Pascal VOC classes, MIT-licensed, no network access needed) and an opt-in YOLOv5s via ONNX Runtime (80 COCO classes, but AGPL-3.0 licensed, which the docs explicitly </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284627" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">flag as a licensing risk for commercial/enterprise use). Detections feed a captioning node that turns bounding boxes into a natural-language description of the frame. A newer object-tracking layer </text><text x="0" y="61.079497856386425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">adds persistent per-object IDs across frames and composes with temporal smoothing rather than replacing it, based on testing that showed the two failed in different situations. Everything is recipe-driven </text><text x="0" y="68.01589468992658" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">via YAML, with a loader/validator and a CLI (helios describe &lt;file&gt; — presumably renaming to match) that auto-picks the right pipeline shape from the file type. Output is written through four </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">sinks — console logging, annotated-frame + JSONL report (inspection), and their scene-description counterparts — validated against a formal, versioned JSON schema. The project backs its claims </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">with real artifacts: a generated 150-frame test video with ground truth, a 100%-accuracy run against it (with an explicit caveat that this is a well-separated synthetic dataset, not real-world footage), </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054704" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and real detector output against a small set of real photographs. It carries 130 tests (126 passing, 4 honestly skipped), including statistical checks, end-to-end accuracy tests, and structural checks that </text><text x="0" y="95.7614820240872" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">every shipped recipe actually builds. Documentation tracks what's implemented ("Phase 0 + start of Phase 1") against a larger blueprint, positioning this explicitly as an early, runnable foundation </text><text x="0" y="102.69787885762736" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">rather than a finished product.</text><text x="0" y="109.63427569116752" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px"
