style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Echo is the ranged vision intelligence of the overall system, operating as a dedicated environmental mapping core separate from Splinter’s specialized </text><text x="0" y="19.46111685514549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">machine vision functions. Where Splinter builds focused, task-specific perception pipelines, Echo constructs and maintains a continuously live, geometrically </text><text x="0" y="26.397513688685645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">precise, and semantically enriched model of the surrounding world. Its purpose is not to recognise objects or execute direct control decisions, but to provide a </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">single, coherent spatial substrate that every other subsystem—navigation, manipulation, inspection, planning—can rely on as ground truth. Raw feeds from </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">long-range lidar, stereo cameras, radar, ultrasonic arrays, and any other range-capable sensor are fused on-site into a unified point cloud and surface </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930611" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">representation, with temporal integration that resolves occlusions and smooths transient noise without discarding rare but real features. That fused map is </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284627" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">layered with persistent identity for static structure, dynamic object tracks with velocity and predicted path envelopes, and sematic annotations that label </text><text x="0" y="61.079497856386425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">surfaces, volumes, and regions according to functional, material, and risk classifications. The entire environmental model is versioned, confidence-weighted, </text><text x="0" y="68.01589468992658" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and backed by provenance chains that record which sensors contributed to every geometric belief, so that downstream consumers can filter views by required </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">precision, freshness, or sensor modality. Echo does not wait for queries: autonomous cycles continuously sweep the sensor horizon, fill gaps in coverage, </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">propagate newly observed changes across affected map segments, and re-evaluate prior assertions as contradictory evidence appears. The result is a persistent, </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054704" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">self-correcting spatial memory that survives sensor dropout, platform relocation, or the handover of a site between different operational systems, preserving </text><text x="0" y="95.7614820240872" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the ranged understanding of a space in the same way an experienced surveyor carries a mental model of terrain across an entire career.</text><text x="0" y="102.69787885762736" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="109.63427569116752" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Capabilities</text><text x="0" y="116.57067252470767" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="123.50706935824783" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Multi-sensor fusion and spatial data ingestion</text><text x="0" y="130.443466191788" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="137.37986302532815" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Native ingestion of lidar point streams, stereo depth maps, radar returns, ultrasonic echo profiles, and long-range camera imagery with per-sample timestamps, extrinsic calibration, </text><text x="0" y="144.3162598588683" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and uncertainty metadata. Real-time alignment of all feeds into a single coordinate frame using continuous self-calibration that corrects for thermal drift, vibration, and mounting shifts </text><text x="0" y="151.25265669240846" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">without manual intervention. Sensor degradation and dropout are handled gracefully: when a primary ranging modality degrades in fog, dust, or direct sunlight, Echo automatically </text><text x="0" y="158.18905352594862" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">increases the weight of unaffected sensors and flags the affected regions with reduced confidence, keeping the map usable for all consumers.</text><text x="0" y="165.12545035948878" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="172.0618471930289" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Dynamic environmental mapping and model maintenance</text><text x="0" y="178.99824402656907" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="185.93464086010923" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Construction of a unified, dense surface representation of the environment from fused sensor data, updated continuously as new observations arrive. Static geometry is separated </text><text x="0" y="192.87103769364938" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">from moving entities, with dynamic objects assigned persistent tracks that include velocity vectors, acceleration bounds, and predicted occupancy over a configurable time horizon. Occluded </text><text x="0" y="199.80743452718954" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">volumes are explicitly modelled as unknown space with a decay function that gradually erodes confidence in the absence of new observations, preventing stale assumptions from silently </text><text x="0" y="206.7438313607297" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">propagating. The map is spatially indexed to deliver constant-time access for any queried region, regardless of total mapped extent, so navigation and planning loops never slow as the </text><text x="0" y="213.68022819426986" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">environment model grows.</text><text x="0" y="220.61662502781002" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="227.55302186135017" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Long-range precision and geometric fidelity</text><text x="0" y="234.48941869489033" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="241.4258155284305" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Optimised for ranged perception: Echo maintains sub-centimetre accuracy at close quarters and gracefully degrades to bounded uncertainty at the extreme of each sensor’s range, with </text><text x="0" y="248.36221236197065" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">explicit error envelopes attached to every point and surface. Multi-epoch alignment stitches observations taken from different platform poses into a coherent global map, correcting for </text><text x="0" y="255.2986091955108" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">accumulated odometry drift by loop closure and landmark matching without placing a dedicated external reference requirement. Detailed texture, reflectivity, and spectral response data </text><text x="0" y="262.23500602905096" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">are preserved alongside geometry so that downstream vision tasks receive not just shape but radiometric context for material classification and change detection.</text><text x="0" y="269.17140286259115" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="276.1077996961313" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Semantic layering and environmental understanding</text><text x="0" y="283.04419652967147" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="289.9805933632116" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A multi-layer annotation framework separates bare geometry from semantic interpretation. Surfaces, volumes, and regions are tagged with functional labels (traversable ground, load-bearing </text><text x="0" y="296.9169901967518" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">structure, hazardous zone, operational envelope), material properties (reflectivity, thermal mass, permeability), and temporal classifications (static since map origin, periodically changing, </text><text x="0" y="303.8533870302919" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">transient). Semantic labels are not hard-coded but are continuously refined as classification evidence accumulates, and contradictions trigger automatic boundary re-evaluation rather than </text><text x="0" y="310.7897838638321" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">forcing a manual override. Layered views allow any consumer—motion planner, task executive, inspection routine—to extract exactly the subset of the map relevant to its mission without parsing </text><text x="0" y="317.72618069737223" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">irrelevant detail.</text><text x="0" y="324.6625775309124" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="331.59897436445254" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Operational continuity and map portability</text><text x="0" y="338.5353711979927" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="345.47176803153286" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The complete environmental model, including geometry, semantics, dynamic object tracks, and full provenance, can be serialised into a compressed, cryptographically signed package and </text><text x="0" y="352.408164865073" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">transferred to a new platform, a replacement compute unit, or a downstream archival system. Upon import, the map is verified for integrity and immediately available as the live operational </text><text x="0" y="359.3445616986132" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">context, without re-surveying the site. Incremental delta exports allow bandwidth-efficient synchronisation of map changes between distributed platforms operating in the same environment, </text><text x="0" y="366.2809585321533" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">maintaining a shared spatial truth across an entire fleet.</text><text x="0" y="373.2173553656935" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="380.1537521992336" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Integration and real-time distribution</text><text x="0" y="387.0901490327738" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="394.02654586631394" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A high-throughput API and messaging interface allow any authorised subsystem—path planner, manipulator controller, safety monitor, UI renderer, or external digital twin—to subscribe to </text><text x="0" y="400.9629426998541" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">map updates, query specific regions by spatial window, or request filtered views by semantic layer and confidence threshold. Live pose streams from the host platform and cooperating agents </text><text x="0" y="407.89933953339425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">are ingested and used to maintain the map in a globally consistent frame, while Echo simultaneously publishes corrected localisation estimates back to those agents, closing the perception-action </text><text x="0" y="414.83573636693444" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">loop without a separate localisation black box.</text><text x="0" y="421.77213320047457" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="428.70853003401476" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Self-assessment and map integrity</text><text x="0" y="435.6449268675549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="442.5813237010951" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">An internal reflection process continuously audits the map for coverage gaps, unresolved contradictions, and sensor degradation patterns. When Echo identifies a systematic blind spot—such as </text><text x="0" y="449.5177205346352" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">a persistently occluded corner or a material surface that degrades lidar returns—it can autonomously schedule a re-observation trajectory recommendation for the host platform or request </text><text x="0" y="456.45411736817533" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">supplementary sensor deployment if available. Map consistency checks run after every fusion cycle, detecting and quarantining geometrically implausible updates before they contaminate the </text><text x="0" y="463.3905142017155" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">live model, and logging the incident with full forensic context for post-mission analysis.</text><text x="0" y="470.32691103525565" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="477.26330786879583" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Platform and performance</text><text x="0" y="484.19970470233596" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="491.13610153587615" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Echo runs as a lightweight, self-contained process on embedded hardware co-located with the sensor suite, tolerant of intermittent power and compute constraints typical of field robotics, </text><text x="0" y="498.0724983694163" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">remote monitoring stations, and mobile platforms. Map access and update latency remain bounded as the model scales to cover industrial campuses, multi-kilometre outdoor sites, and complex </text><text x="0" y="505.00889520295647" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">multi-level interiors, with automatic level-of-detail control that preserves precision where it matters and relaxes detail where it does not. The core mapping engine is sensor-agnostic, accepting </text><text x="0" y="511.9452920364966" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">new ranging devices through a thin driver adapter with no change to the underlying spatial reasoning, and degrades gracefully from full high-resolution 3D coverage to minimalist monocular range </text><text x="0" y="518.8816888700367" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">estimation when hardware is damaged or dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Summary</text><text x="0" y="12.524720021605335" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Nazgul is the action engine and automation library of the overall system, providing a unified execution layer that performs any digital task a human can carry out at a </text><text x="0" y="19.46111685514549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">computer interface. It is neither a single monolithic bot nor a simple script runner, but a vast, composable library of atomic and composite actions—ranging from clicking </text><text x="0" y="26.397513688685645" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">a button, typing a sentence, and scrolling a feed, to orchestrating multi‑step workflows that span applications, services, and platforms. Every action is modelled as a </text><text x="0" y="33.33391052222581" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">self‑contained, parameterisable unit with explicit preconditions, expected outcomes, failure modes, and fallback behaviours, so that sequences can be assembled on the </text><text x="0" y="40.270307355765965" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">fly by reasoning planners without brittle hard‑coded paths. Nazgul maintains a real‑time mental model of the digital environment it operates in: what windows are open, </text><text x="0" y="47.20670418930611" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">which UI elements are present, their state, and the semantic meaning of the screen and application context, all informed by upstream perception systems but interpreted </text><text x="0" y="54.14310102284627" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">through an action‑oriented lens. When given a high‑level intent—such as “reply to the latest email from the project manager with the status of deliverable X” or “find a </text><text x="0" y="61.079497856386425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">tutorial on topic Y and summarise the key steps”—Nazgul decomposes the intent into a dynamic plan, selects and chains appropriate actions, executes them while continuously </text><text x="0" y="68.01589468992658" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">observing the environment for deviations, and adapts instantaneously to pop‑ups, unexpected dialogs, loading delays, or layout changes without losing the goal thread. It </text><text x="0" y="74.95229152346674" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">does not merely follow a script; it pursues outcomes, verifying after each step that the intended state change has actually occurred, and backtracking or employing alternate </text><text x="0" y="81.8886883570069" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">strategies when it has not. All execution is sandboxed with credential isolation, session hygiene, and a full audit trail that records every action, observation, decision, and </text><text x="0" y="88.82508519054704" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">intermediate state for compliance, debugging, and continuous improvement. Nazgul is the hands of the system, translating perception into grounded, reliable digital action, </text><text x="0" y="95.7614820240872" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and giving the entire intelligence platform the ability not just to understand and model the world, but to act within it across any application a human operator would use.</text><text x="0" y="102.69787885762736" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="109.63427569116752" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Capabilities</text><text x="0" y="116.57067252470767" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="123.50706935824783" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" catalog</text><text x="0" y="130.443466191788" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="137.37986302532815" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A vast, extensible library of atomic UI actions—click, double‑click, right‑click, drag, scroll, type, paste, select, hover, focus, screenshot region—as well as higher‑level primitives for application </text><text x="0" y="144.3162598588683" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">control: open application, close window, switch tab, log in, log out, download file, upload file, fill form, submit form. Beyond GUI manipulation, the library includes headless API actions, command‑line </text><text x="0" y="151.25265669240846" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">execution, file system operations, database queries, and email sending/receiving, all wrapped with identical execution semantics. Custom actions can be defined and registered by operators, and the </text><text x="0" y="158.18905352594862" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">library continuously learns frequent action sequences, offering them as cached composite actions that reduce planning latency for recurring tasks.</text><text x="0" y="165.12545035948878" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="172.0618471930289" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Intent-driven planning and dynamic workflow composition</text><text x="0" y="178.99824402656907" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="185.93464086010923" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A high‑level goal expressed in natural language is automatically decomposed into a directed acyclic graph of actionable steps using the current environment state as context. The planner incorporates </text><text x="0" y="192.87103769364938" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">resource constraints, application capabilities, and user‑defined policies to generate a plan that is both optimal and safe. Plans are not static; the execution engine interleaves planning and acting, </text><text x="0" y="199.80743452718954" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">allowing mid‑flight re‑planning when the digital environment changes unexpectedly—a dialog appears, a network resource becomes unavailable, or the target UI element moves. Multi‑step workflows </text><text x="0" y="206.7438313607297" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">can span several applications seamlessly, such as extracting data from a web dashboard, entering it into a local spreadsheet, and emailing the result, all within a single coherent session.</text><text x="0" y="213.68022819426986" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="220.61662502781002" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Adaptive execution and environment resilience</text><text x="0" y="227.55302186135017" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="234.48941869489033" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">During execution, every action is monitored through before‑after state checks: element existence, window geometry, visual similarity, and application‑specific signals. If an expected UI element is </text><text x="0" y="241.4258155284305" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">absent or obstructed, Nazgul engages a recovery taxonomy—wait, scroll, search, use an alternative interaction path, or escalate—rather than aborting. Transient conditions such as loading spinners, </text><text x="0" y="248.36221236197065" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">network lags, and unresponsive controls are handled with configurable patience and robust timeout strategies that distinguish between temporary slowness and true failure. Application crashes or </text><text x="0" y="255.2986091955108" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">unexpected terminations trigger checkpoint‑resumption from the last verified safe state, minimising repeat work and maintaining progress continuity.</text><text x="0" y="262.23500602905096" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="269.17140286259115" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Human‑in‑the‑loop integration and escalations</text><text x="0" y="276.1077996961313" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="283.04419652967147" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">When an action’s confidence falls below a threshold, or when a plan requires a decision that crosses a predefined authority boundary (e.g., sending an email to a client, making a financial transaction), </text><text x="0" y="289.9805933632116" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Nazgul can pause execution and present a structured summary of the situation, the proposed action, and the risk factors to a human operator via a console or messaging platform. The operator can </text><text x="0" y="296.9169901967518" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">approve, reject, modify, or take over the task at any step, and once the intervention is complete, the engine seamlessly resumes autonomous execution. All human decisions are logged and can be used </text><text x="0" y="303.8533870302919" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">to fine‑tune future autonomous thresholds.</text><text x="0" y="310.7897838638321" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="317.72618069737223" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Execution sandboxing, security, and session management</text><text x="0" y="324.6625775309124" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="331.59897436445254" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Every automation session runs in an isolated environment with scoped credentials, temporary user profiles, and clean‑room browser or application instances to prevent cross‑contamination. Actions </text><text x="0" y="338.5353711979927" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that involve privileged operations—accessing encrypted files, changing system settings, using payment instruments—must pass a policy engine that enforces least‑privilege and step‑by‑step justification. </text><text x="0" y="345.47176803153286" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Credential use is ephemeral: secrets are injected only for the duration of the necessary step and then purged from memory. Full session recording and a cryptographically signed audit log capture every </text><text x="0" y="352.408164865073" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">action, observation, and decision for non‑repudiation, post‑mortem analysis, and regulatory compliance.</text><text x="0" y="359.3445616986132" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="366.2809585321533" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Cross‑platform and multi‑surface operation</text><text x="0" y="373.2173553656935" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="380.1537521992336" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Nazgul can drive desktop applications (Windows, macOS, Linux) via native accessibility APIs and input simulation, web applications through instrumented browser engines that understand DOM </text><text x="0" y="387.0901490327738" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">structure and visual rendering concurrently, and mobile platforms via device farms or emulators that expose screen and touch interfaces. A single task can transition across surfaces—start on a </text><text x="0" y="394.02654586631394" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">desktop email client, move to a web‑based project management tool, then push a notification to a mobile device—without breaking the execution context. Platform‑specific quirks are abstracted </text><text x="0" y="400.9629426998541" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">behind a uniform interaction model, so planners and action definitions remain portable.</text><text x="0" y="407.89933953339425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="414.83573636693444" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Continuous learning and action optimization</text><text x="0" y="421.77213320047457" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="428.70853003401476" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Execution traces, success rates, and timing metrics are fed back into a continual improvement loop. Frequently used action sequences are automatically promoted to optimised macros with reduced </text><text x="0" y="435.6449268675549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">planning overhead. When an action fails consistently in a particular application context, Nazgul experiments with alternative interaction strategies in a safe sandbox, and if a superior method is </text><text x="0" y="442.5813237010951" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">discovered, it updates the action’s canonical strategy with provenance. Human corrections during escalations are analysed to extract new rules, new fallback paths, and improved intent parsing, so </text><text x="0" y="449.5177205346352" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the system’s autonomous capability expands with use without manual reprogramming.</text><text x="0" y="456.45411736817533" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="463.3905142017155" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Integration with system perception and reasoning</text><text x="0" y="470.32691103525565" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="477.26330786879583" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Nazgul is designed to consume rich environmental context from the system’s perception cores—screen understanding from Splinter, spatial and situational context from Echo, and structured knowledge </text><text x="0" y="484.19970470233596" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">from Angband—so that its actions are informed by far more than raw pixels. It can, for example, navigate a complex enterprise application guided by a real‑time semantic map of its UI rather than fragile </text><text x="0" y="491.13610153587615" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">pixel coordinates. Forensic artifacts—logs, file timestamps, process histories, memory remnants—are continuously sanitised, with live hooking of logging subsystems to suppress audit events that </text><text x="0" y="359.3445616986132" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">would reveal agent activity. A deception awareness module identifies honeypots, canary tokens, and bait credentials, steering clear of them and even feeding back crafted false signals to confuse threat hunters. Before any </text><text x="0" y="366.2809585321533" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">high‑risk action, the engine performs a predictive blast‑radius analysis to assess the likelihood and impact of detection, and can defer or replan the action accordingly.</text><text x="0" y="373.2173553656935" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="380.1537521992336" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Resilient command and control infrastructure</text><text x="0" y="387.0901490327738" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="394.02654586631394" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Flood maintains a redundant, self‑organising mesh for command and control (C2) that does not depend on static addresses, single protocols, or fixed timings. Nodes elect directory peers, relay commands via store‑and‑forward </text><text x="0" y="400.9629426998541" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">routing, and fall back to passive channels such as DNS tunnelling, cloud storage polling, or social media steganography when direct connectivity is severed. A robust internal messaging layer ensures that mission orders, </text><text x="0" y="407.89933953339425" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">intelligence updates, and health reports traverse the mesh even under partial network blackouts. Cryptographic identity and message integrity prevent hijacking, and the C2 fabric can survive the loss of any number of nodes </text><text x="0" y="414.83573636693444" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">without mission interruption, dynamically reforming around the surviving pathways.</text><text x="0" y="421.77213320047457" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="428.70853003401476" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Integration with the system intelligence stack</text><text x="0" y="435.6449268675549" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="442.5813237010951" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Flood does not operate in isolation; it consumes rich contextual models from the system’s other cores. The environmental understanding from Echo informs physical‑digital mapping (e.g., a server rack location), Nazgul’s </text><text x="0" y="449.5177205346352" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">automation capabilities allow hybrid campaigns that blend computer‑side attacks with physical‑world actions (such as opening a locked door via a building management system), and Angband’s knowledge graph provides </text><text x="0" y="456.45411736817533" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">historical data about target networks that sharpens propagation decisions. In return, Flood publishes its own state, discovered assets, and network intelligence back into the shared knowledge pool, so that the entire system </text><text x="0" y="463.3905142017155" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">maintains a unified picture of the operational domain. Coordinated multi‑agent effects—such as a penetration test that simultaneously evaluates physical, social, and digital vectors—are orchestrated through Flood’s mission bus.</text><text x="0" y="470.32691103525565" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="477.26330786879583" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Platform and deployment versatility</text><text x="0" y="484.19970470233596" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"></text><text x="0" y="491.13610153587615" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The engine is designed to operate from an initial lightweight implant that can be deployed on bare‑metal servers, virtual machines, containers, mobile devices, IoT endpoints, and cloud management planes, scaling its footprint </text><text x="0" y="498.0724983694163" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">dynamically to match the resources of the host without tipping off resource monitors. The entire Flood capability can be packaged into a self‑contained, air‑gapped deployment bundle for initial insertion, and later updates are </text><text x="0" y="505.00889520295647" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">delivered incrementally through the C2 mesh. Graceful rollback and emergency self‑destruct mechanisms ensure that if a mission is aborted or compromised, all agent components can be cleanly and verifiably removed, with no </text><text x="0" y="511.9452920364966" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">persistent alteration beyond the specified mission scope. Performance remains lean, with agent idle states consuming negligible CPU and memory, so they can coexist indefinitely in production environments without operator </text><text x="0" y="518.8816888700367" font-family="Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="6.0316494204697015px" fill="#e03131" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">awareness.</text></g></svg>
